meta.title: Infinity Nikki Resonance Tracker - Pull History & Stats
meta.keywords: Infinity Nikki, Resonance Tracker, Pull Tracker, Gacha Tracker, Pull History, Global Stats, Community Stats, Gongeous

description.default: Track Infinity Nikki resonance banner pull history and statistics. A fan-made tracking and analysis tool for the Infinity Nikki community.
description.login: Sign in to gongeo.us using your email or a third-party account to upload, back up, and sync your Infinity Nikki resonance data across devices.
description.tracker: Track and analyze your Infinity Nikki resonance pull history. View all 5★ and 4★ banner items and compare your luck with other stylists.
description.import: Import your Infinity Nikki resonance pull history easily from game, Whim-Log data or backup files with detailed step-by-step guides.
description.global: Explore Infinity Nikki resonance global data, including banner popularity, pull rates, item drop rates, and community pull statistics.
description.banner: Explore Infinity Nikki resonance banner history with current, upcoming, and past events, featured outfits, pull rates, durations, and rerun details.
description.banner_detail: View the {name} resonance banner details, including featured outfits, item drop rates, pull statistics, duration, evolution info, and rerun status.
description.timeline: Explore an interactive timeline of Infinity Nikki resonance banners, major updates, release periods, and reruns to track event history at a glance.
description.tierlist: Create and share an Infinity Nikki tier list for banners, outfits, and items with drag-and-drop ranking, filters, and easy image export.
description.outfits: Browse all Infinity Nikki outfits with filters for quality, evolution, glow-up, style tags, and stats. See full components and discover every outfit.
description.outfit_detail: View detailed information about the {name} outfit, including quality, outfit pieces, evolution and glow-up, makeups, stats, and related resonance banners.
description.items: Browse all Infinity Nikki items with filters for slot, quality, stat bonuses, and related outfits or banners. Find, compare, and track every item easily.
description.item_detail: View detailed information about the {name} item, including quality, evolution and glow-up, stats, and related outfits and banners.
description.faq: Find answers to frequently asked questions about gongeo.us, including data privacy, import methods, and usage guidelines.
description.about: Learn more about gongeo.us, including its purpose, privacy policy, disclaimers, and how it supports the Infinity Nikki community.
description.stats: View your personal Infinity Nikki resonance pull statistics, luck analysis, streaks, and pulling activity.

default.description: Track Infinity Nikki Resonance History and Statistics
default.copyright: © 2026 gongeo.us • © Infold Games All Rights Reserved

disclaimer.content: This is an unofficial fan-made website, not affiliated with or endorsed by Infold Games.
disclaimer.rights: All Infinity Nikki game assets, content, and trademarks belong to Infold Games and their respective owners.

clear_local_confirm.title: Clear Local Data
clear_local_confirm.content: Are you sure you want to clear local data for {profile} profile? This action cannot be undone.

confirm_upload.title: Upload to Cloud
confirm_upload.content: This will upload local data for {profile} profile to cloud storage, overwriting any existing cloud data for this profile. Continue?

confirm_sync.title: Sync from Cloud
confirm_sync.content: This will sync local data for {profile} profile with cloud data by merging them together. Continue?

missing_profiles.title: Create Missing Profiles
missing_profiles.content: We found cloud data for {profiles}. Create these profiles locally before syncing?

clear_cloud_confirm.title: Clear Cloud Data
clear_cloud_confirm.content: Are you sure you want to clear cloud data for {profile} profile? This action cannot be undone and will permanently delete your data from cloud storage.

delete_confirm.title: Delete Profile
delete_confirm.content: Are you sure you want to delete {profile} profile? This will clear its local data and cloud data (if signed in).

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage profiles, cloud data, and local data.

import.video_tutorial_desc: Watch step-by-step video guide to learn how to import your data:
import.choose_method_desc: Choose how you want to import your pull history.
import.file_import_desc: Import from a previously exported nikki-resonance-data file.
import.login_pearpal_desc: Open Pearpal Website in a new tab and login with your Infold account if you aren't already logged in.
import.login_pearpal_incognito_hint: If you have multiple accounts, it's recommended to open Pearpal in an incognito/private browser window.
import.login_whimlog_desc: Open Whim-Log in a new tab, login and sync your data.
import.get_cookie_desc: Choose how you want to get your Cookie:
import.title: Follow these steps to get your Cookie:

bookmark_steps.step1: Drag the "Gongeous Cookie" button to your bookmarks bar (only needs to be done once):
bookmark_steps.step2: Switch to Pearpal Website in a different tab, make sure you are logged in
bookmark_steps.step3: Click the "Gongeous Cookie" bookmark while on the Pearpal Website
bookmark_steps.step4: Copy the output text in the popup (it should look like the example in the input area below)
bookmark_steps.step5: Come back here and paste the output text in the input area below
bookmark_steps.tip: Tip: You can keep the bookmark for getting Cookie the next time you import

bookmark_steps_mobile.step1: Tap the "Copy Code" button and copy the code
bookmark_steps_mobile.step2: Create a new bookmark in your browser and name it "Gongeous Cookie"
bookmark_steps_mobile.step3: Edit the bookmark URL and replace it with the code you copied
bookmark_steps_mobile.step4: Switch to Pearpal Website in a different tab, make sure you are logged in
bookmark_steps_mobile.step5: Tap the "Gongeous Cookie" bookmark while on the Pearpal Website
bookmark_steps_mobile.step5_android_chrome: Start typing the bookmark name you saved (Gongeous Cookie) in the address bar
bookmark_steps_mobile.step5_android_chrome_2: Select the bookmark from suggestions to run it
bookmark_steps_mobile.step6: Copy the output text in the popup (it should look like the example in the input area below)
bookmark_steps_mobile.step7: Come back here and paste the output text in the input area below

console_steps.step1: Switch to Pearpal Website in a different tab, make sure you are logged in
console_steps.step2: Open your browser's Developer Tools (Press F12 or right-click and select "Inspect")
console_steps.step4: Click the "Copy Code" button, copy and paste the code into the console and press enter:
console_steps.step5: If you get a warning saying "Warning: Don't paste code into the devtools console", type "allow pasting" and hit enter
console_steps.step6: Copy the output text in the console (it should look like the example in the input area below)
console_steps.step7: Come back here and paste the output text in the input area below

manual_steps.note: (Using Google Chrome as an example, exact names might vary for other browsers but steps will be similar)
manual_steps.step1: Switch to Pearpal Website in a different tab, make sure you are logged in
manual_steps.step2: Open your browser's Developer Tools (Press F12 or right-click and select "Inspect")
manual_steps.step3: Go to the "Application" tab (or "Storage" in Firefox)
manual_steps.step4: In the left sidebar, expand "Cookies" and select the Pearpal Website
manual_steps.step5: Alternatively, you can use a browser extension for Cookies like Cookie Editor
manual_steps.step6: Find and copy the values for:
manual_steps.step7: For UID, go to your Pearpal profile and copy your UID number

import.security_note: Note: Never share these Cookie values with anyone else!
import.data_note: Important: Pull data via this import method is retained for only 180 days. Data before {date} won't be available. You can use "Import from Whim-Log" to import older data.

quiz.instructions: Guess the outfit from its silhouette. The faster you answer, the higher your score.

charts.first_item_distribution_tooltip: This banner includes pulls older than 180 days, which are no longer available in game. As a result, the first item distribution data may be inaccurate.

data_source.question: How are you getting the data?
data_source.answer: We are using the same API as the in-game pull history page to access Infold Games servers that store the banner pull data. To access the data, we need to authenticate with the Infold Games server using your account Cookie.

ban_risk.question: Will I get banned for using this?
ban_risk.answer: This is a third-party tool, so there is always some risk, though it is ultimately up to Infold Games. However, similar tools are widely used in other gacha games (Paimon.moe、Star Rail Station、WuWa Tracker etc.) and also in the Chinese community of Infinity Nikki (小黑盒 游创工坊). Take this information as a reference, and make your own judgement.

data_storage.question: What data are you storing?
data_storage.answer: Your pull history is stored locally in your browser, so the next time you visit the site, it will be there unless you clear your browser data. We do not collect any personal information, including the Cookie you submitted.

server_data.question: What data is sent to the server?
server_data.answer: Only your pull statistics are sent to help calculate global stats if you opt in. This includes a hashed version of your UID, and the information of 4★ and 5★ items you pulled.

platform_support.question: Will it work if I play on mobile or PS5?
platform_support.answer: Yes, no matter which platform you play on, you can import your data from PC or mobile. However, on mobile it might not work for all browsers, it is recommended to use PC for better experience, please check the import page for supported browsers and more details.

cookie_script.question: Do I have to run a script to get my Cookie?
cookie_script.answer: No, they are just for convenience, you can get the Cookie manually, check manual input instructions in the import page for more details. However, the only way to get the Cookie on mobile now is to use the bookmark method.

data_loss.question: Why is the data incomplete or missing for some banners?
data_loss.answer: This happens because pull history is only stored in the game for 180 days. After that, it is deleted from the game servers and becomes unavailable. To preserve your data, you can store it in your browser or export it for backup. This way, you can keep records that are no longer available in the game. If you import in the future, your existing data will be merged with the new data.

no_pulls.question: I followed the import steps and saw the banners were processed, but why isn't any pull history showing?
no_pulls.answer: Please double check that your region and Cookie values are correct. Make sure the UID and ID from the Cookie are not mixed up.

auto_update.question: Will my pull data update automatically?
auto_update.answer: No, your pull data will not update automatically. The website needs to be updated to support new banners after each game update. For security reasons, your Cookie will expire after some time, so you'll need to re-import your data. However, if you store your data in your browser, you'll only need to re-import for new banners.

export.question: How can I export my pull history?
export.answer: You can export your pull history as a PNG image or a JSON file. If your browser data is cleared, you can use the JSON file to restore your history.

infinityNikkiAssets.title: Platform and Content Disclaimer
infinityNikkiAssets.content: gongeo.us is an independent fan-operated platform and is not affiliated, endorsed, or partnered with Infinity Nikki or Infold Games. All official game assets, visuals, and related content are the exclusive property of Infold Games and are used here solely for community sharing and educational purposes. We do not claim any ownership or rights over this content.
infinityNikkiAssets.acknowledgment: By using this platform, you acknowledge its unofficial status and accept all risks associated with accessing third-party or unofficial content.

dataAndStats.title: Data and Statistics Disclaimer
dataAndStats.content: All gameplay statistics and data presented on gongeo.us are voluntarily contributed by users and are not sourced from Infold Games. These data sets represent only a small portion of the player community and may not fully reflect overall player behavior or game trends.
dataAndStats.insights: Any insights or conclusions drawn from the data are for informational purposes only and should be considered in light of their community-driven nature.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: gongeo.us is an independent fan project. All trademarks, game content, and intellectual property related to Infinity Nikki remain the sole property of Infold Games and their licensors.
intellectualProperty.siteContent: Except where explicitly stated otherwise, all original code, site design, and custom assets on this platform are owned by gongeo.us and protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws. Unauthorized copying, reuse, or distribution is prohibited without written permission.
intellectualProperty.usage: This platform is provided "as-is" and intended solely for personal, non-commercial use.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection and Storage
dataCollection.content: We collect only the minimal data necessary to operate our service. We do not collect or store any personal information or tracking cookies. Any cookies or UIDs you provide are used solely to communicate with Infold Games server to verify your account and retrieve your pull history.
dataCollection.pullHistory: Your pull history is stored locally in your browser once imported. For cloud backup or cross-device access, you may optionally sign in via Discord, Google, or email to sync your data through secure cloud storage provided by Supabase. You may also choose to contribute anonymized statistics about your 4-star and 5-star pulls to help generate community statistics.

accountSecurity.title: Account and Security
accountSecurity.content: All essential features remain fully accessible without requiring an account. If you choose to sign in, authentication is securely handled by Supabase. We never access or store your login credentials. You have complete control of your data, with the ability to share, upload, sync or delete it at any time. For permanent account deletion, contact us through Discord or email.
accountSecurity.security: While we implement necessary security measures using industry standards, please be aware that no internet transmission can be guaranteed as completely secure.

analytics.title: Analytics and Tracking
analytics.content: We utilize Umami, a privacy-focused analytics service, to monitor website usage. It collects only anonymized information such as page views, referrer URLs, and basic browser data without using Cookie or personal identifiers. This data helps us improve your experience. For more information, please see Umami's privacy policy.

errorMonitoring.title: Error Monitoring
errorMonitoring.message: We use Sentry.io to track and fix technical errors. Sentry may collect limited technical data (like error details, browser info, and anonymized IP addresses) to help us maintain and improve the site. For more information, please see Sentry.io's privacy policy.

advertising.title: Advertising
advertising.content: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements on this platform. AdSense may use cookies and similar technologies to serve ads based on your visit to this and other websites.
advertising.eeaNotice: For users in the European Economic Area (EEA), United Kingdom, and other applicable regions, a consent form will be presented to manage your preferences regarding personalized and non-personalized ads in accordance with applicable privacy laws.

vote.description: Help us determine the most popular banners from version 1.x! Vote on your favorite banners in head-to-head matchups.
vote.howItWorks: Pick your favorite banner and submit your vote to help rank the most popular banners. Skip if you're not sure. You can vote up to 50 times every 24 hours.
vote.abuseNotice: Please do not abuse the voting system. Unusual voting patterns will be detected, and those votes may be removed.

mode.personalDesc: Your votes are stored locally and create your personal rankings. Does not affect community rankings.
mode.communityDesc: Your votes contribute to the community rankings and help determine the most popular banners.
